title: PEI Coating
description: {"blocks":[{"key":"bofkm","text":"PEI coating 96 and /or 384 wps for highly adherent NGN2 iN replating on DIV3","type":"unstyled","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[],"entityRanges":[],"data":{}},{"key":"93ts2","text":"","type":"unstyled","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[],"entityRanges":[],"data":{}},{"key":"6mqrp","text":"Based on SOP from Max+ Bobby / Background optimization results","type":"unstyled","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[],"entityRanges":[{"key":0,"offset":0,"length":28},{"key":1,"offset":31,"length":31}],"data":{}},{"key":"3mt42","text":"","type":"unstyled","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[],"entityRanges":[],"data":{}},{"key":"1e91e","text":"Also refer to: https://www.protocols.io/view/pei-laminin-coating-b5y8q7zw","type":"unstyled","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[],"entityRanges":[{"key":2,"offset":15,"length":58}],"data":{}}],"entityMap":{"0":{"type":"link","mutability":"MUTABLE","data":{"guid":"BB9E2EC89DE611ECBCD90A58A9FEAC02","url":"https://docs.google.com/document/d/1jjgOHTli3sgNscG96JqjLPpmWXwz_eCfGuYQdTCZwNo/edit"}},"1":{"type":"link","mutability":"MUTABLE","data":{"guid":"96EBF8749DE611ECBCD90A58A9FEAC02","url":"https://docs.google.com/presentation/d/1M1z_LAq4sLjcTm6ZxwjIG_85TNRGZ494IrIsCLNjaWI/edit#slide=id.gb55805cdc9_0_0"}},"2":{"type":"link","mutability":"MUTABLE","data":{"guid":"BBC7BAE59DE911ECBCEB0A58A9FEAC02","url":"https://www.protocols.io/view/pei-laminin-coating-b5y8q7zw"}}}}
steps: Add 500 mg of Polyethylenimine (branched) Merck MilliporeSigma (Sigma-Aldrich) Catalog #408727-100ML to a 50mL conical tube. PEI stock is an extremely high viscosity liquid. To weigh, Torr a liquid vessel of appropriate volume and use an object to 'stick' goopy PEI on the side to weigh.
Add 30 mL of Gibco™ Distilled Water Gibco - Thermo Fisher Scientific Catalog #15-230-170 to the tube
Add Gibco™ Distilled Water Gibco - Thermo Fisher Scientific Catalog #15-230-170 to bring volume up to 45 mL . Mix again.

Filter-sterilize: pour concentrated PEI solution into a 500mL filter flask. FOR 1x stock final [PEI] = 1 mg / 1 mL : Add Gibco™ Distilled Water Gibco - Thermo Fisher Scientific Catalog #15-230-170 to bring volume up to 500mL.
Aliquot PEI solution into 50mL conicals. Use immediately or proceed to step 7

Heat the PEI solution t0 ~ 37 °C on beads. Mix intermittently until PEI is dissolved. PEI takes a while to go into solution: Shake conical and/or bottle vigorously ever 5-10 min. Takes at least 30 min to fully into solution. Can use hot water directly from tap as a bath to speed up heat transfer.
creator: kat.titterton
